name: estonia_fuel_prices
description: Fetches current fuel prices (Euro 95, Diesel) for Estonia or Latvia from fuel-prices.eu with EU comparison and weekly trends.
help_example:
fuel — Estonia prices (default, 70L)
fuel latvia — Latvia prices
fuel diesel — diesel only
fuel 95 — Euro 95 only
fuel latvia 50 — Latvia, 50L tank
fuel riga diesel — Latvia diesel
